name: clone-workflow
description: Machine-readable mirror of .claude/skills/clone-website/SKILL.md — the 5-phase website reverse-engineering workflow.

targetUrls.description: One or more URLs to clone

phases.name: Reconnaissance
phases.description: Navigate to target URL, capture screenshots, extract global styles, perform interaction sweep, map page topology

tasks.name: Take Screenshots
tasks.description: Full-page screenshots at desktop (1440px) and mobile (390px)

tasks.name: Global Extraction
tasks.description: Extract fonts, colors, favicons, meta tags, global UI patterns

tasks.name: Mandatory Interaction Sweep
tasks.description: Scroll sweep, click sweep, hover sweep, responsive sweep at 3 viewports

tasks.name: Page Topology Mapping
tasks.description: Map every section, document visual order, fixed/sticky overlays, layout structure

phases.name: Foundation Build
phases.description: Sequential setup of fonts, globals.css, TypeScript types, SVG icons, asset download

tasks.name: Update Fonts in layout.tsx
tasks.description: Configure fonts to match target site

tasks.name: Update globals.css
tasks.description: Color tokens, spacing, keyframe animations, utility classes

tasks.name: Extract SVG Icons
tasks.description: Deduplicate and save as React components in icons.tsx

tasks.name: Download Global Assets
tasks.description: Generate and run download script for images, videos, fonts

phases.name: Component Specification & Dispatch
phases.description: Per-section extraction, spec file writing, builder agent dispatch, worktree merge

tasks.name: Extract Section CSS
tasks.description: Run CSS extraction script via browser MCP for each section

tasks.name: Dispatch Builder Agent
tasks.description: Hand spec file to builder agent in worktree

tasks.name: Merge Worktree Branch
tasks.description: Merge builder output into main, resolve conflicts, verify build

phases.name: Page Assembly
phases.description: Wire all sections into page.tsx, connect content, implement page-level behaviors

tasks.name: Wire Section Components
tasks.description: Import and compose all sections in src/app/page.tsx

tasks.name: Connect Real Content
tasks.description: Pass actual text and assets to component props

tasks.name: Implement Page-Level Behaviors
tasks.description: Scroll snap, scroll-driven animations, intersection observers, smooth scroll

phases.name: Visual QA Diff
phases.description: Side-by-side comparison, section-by-section verification, interactive testing

tasks.name: Side-by-Side Comparison
tasks.description: Compare original and clone at desktop (1440px) and mobile (390px)

tasks.name: Fix Discrepancies
tasks.description: Check spec file, re-extract if needed, fix component to match spec

tasks.name: Interactive Testing
tasks.description: Test all scroll behaviors, click interactions, hover effects, animations
